hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/tauri/src/'; then /home/user/dbunitcli/tauri/node_modules/.bin/biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
